violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Wiping cloth solution exceeded 200 PPM. Use test papers to monitor concentrations. ** Corrected during review.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Sanitizer solution tested less than 200 ppm quat. Add more tablets or make new batch before more dishwashing done. ** Corrected during inspection.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not maintained according to regulation. - Triple sink faucet will not shut off so pump is shut off when operating. Must be repaired before next use.
